title: T-126 — Authorization policy helpers, actions and preflight blockers
prompt:
# T-126 — Authorization policy helpers, actions and preflight blockers

## Goal
Implement the typed helpers, server actions, and preflight blockers for Settings-owned per-org authorization policies. T-122 owns schema/seed; this task owns runtime validation used by feature flags, import/export, Roles & Permissions, and the Authorization Policies screen.

This is backend/API scope only. Do not implement the T-127 screen here.

## Files in scope
- packages/auth/src/authorization-policies.ts [create/modify]
- packages/auth/src/__tests__/authorization-policies.test.ts [create/modify]
- packages/server/src/settings/authorization-policy-actions.ts [create/modify]
- packages/server/src/__tests__/authorization-policy-actions.test.ts [create/modify]

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- Given helpers evaluate `npd_post_release_edit`, when policy/flag state is missing or invalid, then typed blockers cover disabled policy, missing request/authorize permission, missing authorizer role, self-authorization, and `requires_new_version=false`.
- Given helpers evaluate `technical_product_spec_approval`, when policy/flag state is missing or invalid, then typed blockers cover missing active `technical_product_spec_approval_gate_v1`, min_approvers < 1, missing approver role, and disabled approval policy.
- Given a policy update action is called, when permissions and validation pass, then the action writes an audit reason, increments policy version, preserves org isolation, and returns policy summary for UI consumption.
- Given dry-run/preflight is called by feature flags or import/export, when blockers exist, then no feature flag/import mutation is committed.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: add helper/action tests for every V-SET-43/V-SET-44 blocker, permission-denied, audit reason required, version increment, and org isolation.
- GREEN: implement typed helpers/actions and make them consumable by T-020, T-121/T-125 and T-127 without UI-only validation.
- Run targeted auth/server tests plus typecheck/lint for changed packages.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement NPD or Technical application workflows; Settings only publishes policy decisions.
- Do not allow in-place mutation of released factory specs/BOMs; `requires_new_version=true` is invariant.
- Do not let CSV import, feature flag toggle, or UI save bypass helper preflights.
- Do not implement T-127 UI in this backend task.
## Closeout evidence required
- changed_files (with line counts)
- exact test commands and outputs (RED -> GREEN, typecheck, lint)
- acceptance_criteria_status (one row per AC: pass/fail)
- deviations_from_prd (or "none")
- git_status
